title: CrowdStrike Expands CrowdStrike Falcon Platform with Industry's Most Complete Adversary-Driven External Attack Surface Management Technology to Minimize Risk from Exposed Assets
text: AUSTIN, Texas--( BUSINESS WIRE )--CrowdStrike (Nasdaq: CRWD), a leader in cloud-delivered protection of endpoints, cloud workloads, identity and data, today announced it has expanded the CrowdStrike Falcon platform to deliver the industry's most complete adversary-driven External Attack Surface Management (EASM) technology for enhanced adversary intelligence and real-time discovery of internet exposures. As part of this platform expansion, CrowdStrike introduced CrowdStrike Falcon Surface as a standalone module, which features capabilities from the recent acquisition of Reposify.
